title: Rei Refused the Human instrumentality project
display_title: Rei Refused the Human instrumentality project
wikitext:
[]: Rei Refused the Human instrumentality project ?             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Mon Jun 25, 2007 12:59 pm Hey , Back to end of Evangelion , When Rei's final form dies and Shinji is shown sitting on the beach (sea of LCL) , Before he suffocates Asuka to regain the feeling of reality within his mind , Rei is shown floating or standing over the sea , Doesnt that some how mean that one of Rei's clone may have refused the project and came back like Asuka/Shinji did ? I had some other questions , I gotta rewatch End of Evangelion sometime soon . -DVD- SOTFT = Stay on the Fing Topic *Boy this place really needs some rules* :P ThX

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jun 25, 2007 1:18 pm I just assumed the Rei at the end was just a bookend - like the one in ep. 1 when Shinji's on the phone before he feels Sachiel's shock-waves. I've often wondered if the "Rei bookends" are not actually Rei but a representation of Yui watching over Shinji in the form of Rei. I need to find more evidence to turn that into an actual theory though. But to answer your post: No, I'm pretty sure it has nothing to do with Rei and instrumentality.

[]:             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Mon Jun 25, 2007 1:36 pm Wait a second, 1- How can you be so sure that Rei didnt refuse the instrumentality project ? There's more than one Rei in the show . 2- Why on earth would Yui send a Rei looking thing to watch over Shinji , That kinda makes her a god here and i believe if she really wanted to watch over Shinji then she would send her form not Rei's .

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jun 25, 2007 1:56 pm Coded to the Core wrote: Wait a second, 1- How can you be so sure that Rei didnt refuse the instrumentality project ? There's more than one Rei in the show . 2- Why on earth would Yui send a Rei looking thing to watch over Shinji , That kinda makes her a god here and i believe if she really wanted to watch over Shinji then she would send her form not Rei's .

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jun 25, 2007 2:16 pm Coded to the Core wrote: 2- Why on earth would Yui send a Rei looking thing to watch over Shinji , That kinda makes her a god here and i believe if she really wanted to watch over Shinji then she would send her form not Rei's .

[]:             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Mon Jun 25, 2007 3:32 pm Ornette Coleman: With instrumentality stopped, and no more collective conciousness, the only choice people have is to either exist disembodied (but not as one, since Instrumentality was ended) or to return. Individuals do not need to reject instrumenality, since it's already been stopped.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jun 25, 2007 3:43 pm It seems that Rei was created when Yui's DNA (within Shogouki) mixed with Lilith's soul and the result was Rei 1. Rei has Yui's form because she's made of Yui's DNA. However her soul is that of Lilith. So what we have with Rei is a representation - of sorts - of 3 different people: Rei's body = Yui's form Rei's soul = Lilith Rei as herself. Think of it as combining two entities and getting a new, but different entity. This new entity contains parts from the previous ones, but nonetheless it is a seperate entity unto itself (I don't think I'm explaining this well). Anno does this a lot in the series - that is using one thing to represent several things. In Rei we have a representation of Lilith, Yui, and Rei. So we can say that the "bookmarks" are these 3 beings all watching over Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jun 25, 2007 4:19 pm Coded to the Core wrote: But all the human soul's that was wasted for the instrumentality didnt gain it's body form right ? Or do you mean that Shinji is not the last person on earth with Asuka ?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 25, 2007 4:49 pm All I gotta say in case it wasn't mentioned yet in this topic is both Bookend Reis are Rei III. And in 26', just to make this clear, just because Lilith's body is physcially dead does NOT mean her soul (Rei) is, too. Hence part of the reason we see in the final scene at all?? Lilith = Mother of Lilim/humanity Yui = Shinji's mother Rei = Physical form of Yui with the soul of Lilith All of this adds up to the two "mothers" watching over Shinji in the form of Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Tue Jul 10, 2007 2:19 pm For some reason a lot of the guff and what ifs I had floating around in my mind about the fabled Instrumentality Project just re alinged themselves after reading this thread. Just a comment or a compliment, thanks guys.
